'''rapono''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:fibroepithelioma|fibroepithelioma]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-p-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fibroepithelioma|fibroepithelioma]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| rapono
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || ræpeneth || ræpenej || ræpenesh || ræpene
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || rapoponoth || rapoponoj || rapoponosh || rapopono
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || raponoth || raponoj || raponosh || rapono
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || rapofnofth || rapofnofj || rapofnofsh || rapofnof
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || raponotho || raponojo || raponosho || raponoko
|-
| [[Patient]] || raponoth || raponoj || raponosh || rapono
|-
| [[Possessive]] || raponothol || raponojol || raponoshol || raponokol
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || raponoothotho || raponoojojo || raponooshosho || raponooko
|-
| [[Dative]] || raponothon || raponojon || raponoshon || raponokon
|-
| [[Speaker]] || raponothooro || raponojooro || raponoshooro || raponokooro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|cb332aa}}
